session.user: Run `pytest tests/ -x -q -k "run_table or run_detail or RunRow or run_row or fake_provider"` and report all results. This is read-only - just run and report results.
session.assistant: I'll execute the pytest command to run tests matching the specified patterns and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run pytest tests/ -x -q -k "run_table or run_detail or RunRow or run_row or fake_provider"
Run pytest with specified test pattern filters

session.assistant:
Pytest passed: 25 tests completed successfully
All tests matching the pattern (run_table, run_detail, RunRow, run_row, or fake_provider) executed without failures. The test suite includes tests for:
- Run table display components - Run detail view functionality - RunRow data structures - Fake provider implementations
No errors, failures, or skipped tests were reported in the execution.
